message:
fix(channel/fault,observability): fix reorder stat corruption + cycle_nodes overflow

1. channel/fault.rs: record_reorder() was called before auto_flush
   which could fail (cancel/disconnect). Moved stat recording after
   the successful send path to prevent phantom reorder counts.

2. observability/diagnostics.rs: cycle_nodes counter used plain +=
   unlike sibling counters (ingress/egress/trapped) which use
   saturating_add. Overflow would corrupt deadlock cycle_ratio.

Also records 8-file audit of channels, observability, and trace.
Session total: 92 files, 6 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
